channel.title: Casa Caravan Space
channel.description: Sound healing, fermentation, plant medicine, music and creative tools. A space that helps you realize yourself. By Tağmaç Çankaya, Lefkoşa, Cyprus.

item.title: There is a type of person who cannot stop beginning things.
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: The thread running through everything is not a subject matter. It is an appetite — for making something real where nothing was before, for understanding a material from the inside, for finding the conditions under which life organizes itself well. Law, business, social movements, soil, fermentation, coffee, wood, metal, sound, and now code. Read the full story at casacaravan.space/about.html

item.title: Sonic Journey — Sound Sessions in Lefkoşa
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: 45-minute immersive sound session with hand-forged gongs and handpan. Wednesdays in Lefkoşa. Individual sessions €75, duo €37.50 per person. Nine five-star reviews. "The body doesn't argue with a gong. It responds." Book via casacaravan.space/shop.html or WhatsApp +90 533 880 0870.

item.title: The Corridor is Open — A Digital Space with Rooms
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: A 3D corridor with rooms for sound, fermentation, herbal knowledge and more. Built with Three.js. Walk through, open doors, explore tools — all in the browser. No install. No account. casacaravan.space/corridor-3d.html

item.title: Sourdough Starter — A Decade of Living Culture
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: 200g of living sourdough culture — the same starter used for nearly a decade. Pioneer of sourdough bread in Cyprus. Feed it 1:1 flour and water by weight. Use 200g per 1000g of flour. Cyprus delivery. €15. casacaravan.space/shop.html

item.title: The Garden — A Night Space with a Real Moon
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: Step outside. A night garden with fireflies, ambient forest sounds, live chat, a radio with three stations — and a moon showing today's real lunar phase, calculated in real time from astronomical data. casacaravan.space/garden.html
